programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Martin Roberts. Martin Roberts bought a 17th century farmhouse and immediately sensed spirits in it. The team set out to uncover the extraordinary secrets of this ancient house. S1, Ep6

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Louie Spence. The dance star is spooked by strange smells and sinister shadows. He hopes it's his late mum, but the investigation goes down a murderous route no one sees coming! S2, Ep1

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Laurence Llewelyn-Bowen. Laurence's home has a history of harrowing hauntings. When the home reveals its Quaker past, a spirit comes forward with a murderous story to tell. S2, Ep2
Teleshopping.
Rural Life. In London, Drew visits a fledgling antiques business run by an enterprising young couple. Plus, he faces punishing negotiations at a living history museum in Surrey. S9, Ep14
Cornwall At War. Drew gets a scoop when he delves into the history and mechanics of print in London's Fleet Street. And, in Devon, he indulges his passion for architectural salvage. S9, Ep15
A couple want to find their forever home by the coast in Sussex. They have a budget of £500,000 to spend on an idyllic property with a beautiful sea view. S7, Ep9

Prospective buyers around the UK wanting to swap hectic city living for a home in the country are shown an array of beautiful rural properties. S17, Ep12
Big changes are afoot for Drew in Conwy. He hunts for fresh stock in a stunning 1730s Sussex mansion, and in Lincoln he spots an unusual 19th century medical cabinet. S17, Ep2
Modern day treasure hunter Drew Pritchard travels the length and breadth of the UK in search of weird and wonderful objects. The bigger the hoard, the happier he is. S17, Ep3
In Fulham, Drew prepares to spend big with some elite dealers. In Hastings, Drew and Tee unearth some unusual Chinese watercolours and a Turkish rug. S17, Ep4
Auctioneer Charles Hanson and dealer Margie Cooper head to Leicester for their final auction. Which of the experts will turn the biggest profit? S12, Ep10
Philip Serrell and Anita Manning both start the competition with £200. Their road trip begins in Windermere in the Lake District and takes them over 1,200 miles. S12, Ep11
Silversmith Brenton restores a musical salt and pepper pot from 1955 Hong Kong. Plus, mechanical expert Steve brings a broken childhood doll back to life. S6, Ep14

Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help a couple who are desperate to find their first-born child and a son searching for the mother who abandoned him. S10, Ep1
Davina McCall and Nicky Campbell help a woman find her brother and a woman who is still dealing with the impact of her teenage pregnancy years later. S10, Ep2
Norwegian Silver. Angus helps a lady part with her late husband's cherished medals. And a well-travelled woman sells her quirky items to fund a trip of a lifetime. S4, Ep15
Angus Pulls A Cracker. Angus uncovers an unopened bottle of 1940s whisky and some Victorian Christmas crackers. At auction it's chocks away for an old cabin crew uniform. S4, Ep16
Antiques experts travel the UK with a budget of £200 each in a competition to find and buy antiques or rare items and sell them for a profit. S25, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Bear Grylls. Bear Grylls discovers the stories behind the documents hidden in his grandfather's wartime trunk and is delighted by a Scottish royal connection. S19, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Who Do You Think You Are?
programmes.show_description: Claire Foy. As Claire Foy delves into her family tree, the personal testimony she uncovers reveals stories of tragedy and an accusation of murder. S19, Ep2

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Marnie Simpson. A regrettable graveyard photoshoot leaves Marnie with a dark attachment. The team need to act quickly to rid her of the evil spirit before it's too late! S2, Ep3

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Simon Gregson. An action-packed investigation that leaves Simon and the team's minds blown when the terrifying evidence points to a dark and murderous past. S2, Ep4

programmes.show_name: Celebrity Help! My House Is Haunted
programmes.show_description: Jake Quickenden. In a highly emotional case, the team not only try to contact Jake's late father and brother but also discover Jake was once a civil war solder in a past life. S2, Ep5
